description: To prepare for submission to the LCA Commons, create a Unit Process in OpenLCA named 'Bio-based Polyol Production'. Create and link an Actor named 'EcoTech Consulting' as the Data Generator and a Source named 'Q4 2024 Production Report' as the Publication/Source. Set the Geography (e.g., US or GLO), the Technology Description to 'Enzymatic hydrolysis of agricultural residues.', and the Validity period start date to 2024-01-01.
